ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clk_div_factors" (
  "clk_div_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clock division factor configuration */,
  "clkps3" INTEGER /* Value of CLKPS3 bit */,
  "clkps2" INTEGER /* Value of CLKPS2 bit */,
  "clkps1" INTEGER /* Value of CLKPS1 bit */,
  "clkps0" INTEGER /* Value of CLKPS0 bit */,
  "division_factor" INTEGER /* Resulting clock division factor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clk_div_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mcu_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller configuration */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller */,
  "clk_div_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clock division factor configuration */,
  "prescaler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prescaler configuration */,
  "oscillator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the oscillator configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using this configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, deprecated, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mcu_configs_prescaler_id FOREIGN KEY ("prescaler_id") REFERENCES prescalers ("prescaler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mcu_configs_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mcu_configs_oscillator_id FOREIGN KEY ("oscillator_id") REFERENCES oscillators ("oscillator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mcu_configs_clk_div_id FOREIGN KEY ("clk_div_id") REFERENCES clk_div_factors ("clk_div_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mcu_configs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller */,
  "mcu_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the microcontroller */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the microcontroller */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the microcontroller was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the microcontroller information */,
  "specs" TEXT /* Specifications of the microcontroller (e.g., memory, power consumption) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescalers" (
  "prescaler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescaler configuration */,
  "prescaler_value" INTEGER /* Value of the prescaler */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prescaler configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prescaler configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prescaler configuration */,
  "specs" TEXT /* Specifications of the prescaler (e.g., maximum input frequency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescaler_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oscillators" (
  "oscillator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each oscillator configuration */,
  "oscillator_type" TEXT /* Type of the oscillator */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the oscillator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the oscillator configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the oscillator configuration */,
  "specs" TEXT /* Specifications of the oscillator (e.g., tolerance, stability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oscillator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_access_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES mcu_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version (if applicable) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES mcu_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in the version history */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change (if applicable) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was approved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES config_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_projects" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the client */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
